breathing_instruction: Take a slow, deep breath in... and let it out fully. Bring their memory to mind.
carry_description: Grief is not only about letting go. It is also about keeping connection alive. What beautiful quality, value, or habit of {{name}} would you like to carry forward in your own daily actions?
carry_footer: This doesn't need to be massive. A tiny, quiet action holds infinite value.
carry_question: One simple way I will carry their presence today:
connection_subtitle: Bring their presence into this calm moment
cue_body: Take a moment to sit quietly with the memory of {{name}}. Let yourself feel whatever emotion arises.
pace_instruction: Take all the time you need
past_entries_subtitle: Your quiet book of honoring memories
placeholder_step: I will carry their kindness by...
prompt_why: Why does this wish feel important to you today?
prompt_wish: If you could offer one gentle wish to {{name}} right now, what would it be?
prompt_wish_subtitle: It could be a wish of peace, comfort, or eternal love.
reflection_footer: Your thoughts and commitments are kept secure. Let these memories continue to spark light inside you.
welcome_description: When we lose someone, our connection doesn't end. This is a quiet space to dedicate a gentle wish to them.
welcome_subtitle: Honoring those we carry in our hearts

common.completion_message: You've successfully completed this activity. Take a moment to appreciate your progress.
common.share_text: I have done this {{activityName}} in TherapyMantra and really enjoy it you can do it too just follow the link to android app {{androidUrl}} or ios app {{iosUrl}}
common.instruction_ready: Set your rounds and tap play to begin
common.instruction_running: Follow the circle to regulate your breath

there_s_no_single_way_to_carry: There's no single way to carry
what_stays_with_you_in_your_own_way: What stays with you, in your own way,
you_can_return_to_this_anytime: You can return to this anytime.
